item.title: Unloading Grain on the Go
item.description: Laura Farms shares a look at unloading grain on the go, capturing a practical moment from busy harvest work on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Unloading Grain on the Go

item.title: Farming Team Steps In to Help
item.description: Laura Farms shares a team effort on the farm, showing how teamwork and determination keep things moving when help is needed.

item.title: Will It Start on the Farm?
item.description: Laura Farms checks whether the machine will start, keeping the work moving with a practical, hands-on farm moment.

media:content.media:description: Laura Farms checks whether the machine will start, keeping the work moving with a practical, hands-on farm moment.

item.title: Picking Up the New John Deere 8RX 370
item.description: Laura Farms picks up the new John Deere 8RX 370, sharing a straightforward look at a big day on the farm.

item.title: Not Every Part of Farming Is Fun
item.description: A real look at farm life, where not every job is fun. Laura Farms shares the everyday side of farming with honesty and determination.

media:content.media:title: Not Every Part of Farming Is Fun
media:content.media:description: A real look at farm life, where not every job is fun. Laura Farms shares the everyday side of farming with honesty and determination.

item.title: A Simple Farm Hack That Saved Time
item.description: Laura Farms shares a simple farm hack that helped save hours and keep the work moving on the farm.

media:content.media:title: A Simple Farm Hack That Saved Time

item.title: Servicing Pivot Irrigation Towers
item.description: Laura Farms shows how they service pivot irrigation towers, sharing a practical look at farm maintenance and the work that keeps irrigation running smoothly.

media:content.media:title: Servicing Pivot Irrigation Towers
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shows how they service pivot irrigation towers, sharing a practical look at farm maintenance and the work that keeps irrigation running smoothly.

item.title: Starting a Farm on Borrowed Money
item.description: Laura Farms shares the reality of starting a farm on borrowed money, showing the determination and daily work it takes to build a life on the land.

media:content.media:title: Starting a Farm on Borrowed Money

item.title: How Farming Has Changed Since the 1890s
item.description: A look at how farming has changed since the 1890s, showing the progress, tools, and daily work that shape farm life today.

media:content.media:title: How Farming Has Changed Since the 1890s

item.title: We Brought Our Auction Finds Home
item.description: Laura Farms brings their auction finds home and gets them settled in. A simple farm day with tractors, machinery, and the excitement of new additions.

item.title: Can This 59-Year-Old Tractor Be Fixed?
item.description: Laura Farms takes a look at a 59-year-old tractor and works through the question of whether it can be fixed.

item.title: The Oldest Tractor I've Ever Seen!
item.description: Laura Farms takes a look at an incredibly old tractor and shares the experience of seeing farm machinery with a long history.
